title: wedelia ramagii
intro: Wedelia ramagii, also known as the 'Butterfly Weed', is a tropical flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is rich in medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia ramagii include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for treating fever, cough, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, or used in traditional medicine as a powder or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
